description_long: This is a stylized adult human figure with outstretched arms and legs, lying on its back. The figure is bald and has a separate, detached hairpiece positioned near the head. The person is dressed in a short-sleeved shirt and knee-length shorts, with no visible footwear. The facial features are minimalistic, with a small nose and mouth, and the hands are open with fingers splayed. The overall form is smooth and cartoon-like, with simplified anatomical details and a matte finish.
description: A stylized adult human figure in a lying pose, wearing a short-sleeved shirt and shorts, with a detachable hairpiece and minimalistic features.
description_view_0: View from the feet looking toward the head, showing the outstretched arms, open hands, and the detached hairpiece above the head.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the profile of the face, the shirt and shorts, and the hairpiece floating beside the head.
description_view_2: View from the head looking toward the feet, showing the face, chest, and the hairpiece to the right of the head.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the profile of the body, the outstretched arm, and the hairpiece floating to the left.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt and knee-length shorts
attribute_posture: lying on back with arms and legs outstretched
